description: LY Corporation is a Japanese technology company formed from the reorganization of group companies including LINE and Yahoo! JAPAN. Its lycorp.co.jp site primarily provides corporate, service, and technology information.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on lycorp.co.jp itself. The domain appears to be a corporate/technology site; developer-facing APIs discussed there point to other domains such as LINE Developers, not lycorp.co.jp endpoints.
